heroSubtitle: Free encyclopedias, made by people who care
heroTagline: The light is on, the roots run deep.
aboutText: Here's the thing. We started writing an encyclopedia about a small London neighborhood. Then one about padel. Then mushrooms in Portugal. Then a whole city. At some point we realized — it's not about any one topic. It's about a way of doing things. Each encyclopedia is free, written for real people, and built to last. No investors, no algorithms, no paywalls. Just people who care about a subject — and take the time to write it well.
value1: Every article is free. No paywalls, ever.
value2: Written for readers, not search engines.
value3: We'd rather have 50 good articles than 500 bad ones.
value4: No investors, no ads. Just people who care.
barnesDesc: A quiet London neighborhood with 800 years of stories. We're writing them down.
padelDesc: The fastest-growing sport you haven't tried yet. Rules, technique, courts, gear — all in one place.
setubalDesc: A city in Portugal with more seafood than you can imagine. Routes, markets, secrets.
cogumelosDesc: Portuguese mushrooms. Which ones to eat, which ones to admire from a safe distance.
tarotDesc: Tarot as history, art, and culture — not fortune-telling.
roadmapDoneText: 5 encyclopedias, 1,200+ articles, 3 languages. All free, all open.
roadmapNowText: Improving quality, adding depth, expanding existing projects.
roadmapNextText: New topics, better tools, stronger community.
supportText: Everything here is free. Always will be. No ads, no subscriptions, no tricks. But someone keeps the light on. If you want to help — the door is open.
supportFormulas: One coffee = one article stays free.
Free knowledge costs someone. Today it can cost a coffee.
Five people, no investors, zero ads. But the light stays on.
footerEndorsement: FolkUp is an independent project. Not affiliated with any organization.
